rationale: No qualitative change from last cycle — Iran deal remains unresolved, energy price uncertainty persists; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant to Polish daily life.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over Iran nuclear/sanctions deal keeps global oil supply outlook unclear, indirectly affecting energy prices in Poland. No resolution yet — same pattern as prior cycle.

top_events.title: Ukraine targets Russian energy infrastructure (sea terminal)
top_events.summary: Ukraine continues striking Russian energy assets, which may modestly affect global energy supply dynamics relevant to Polish energy costs and war trajectory. No major escalation.

top_events.title: EU migration rules debate intensifies
top_events.summary: Ongoing EU-level debate on migration policy has indirect relevance for Poland given its role as a transit and destination country. No new binding decisions announced.
